title: EPA v. CORNWALL PAPER MILLS
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1976-0003: CORNWALL PAPER MILLS
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated With Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Penalties and Costs:
Federal Penalty: $10,000

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CWA: 301: NPDES Discharge without a Permit (Other Unpermitted Discharges)

Defendants:
  CORNWALL PAPER MILL COMPANY

Facilities:
  CORNWALL PAPER MILL CO, FORGE HILL ROAD, CORNWALL, NY

Case Milestones:
  01/01/1976: Referred To Headquarters
  08/10/1976: Referred TO U.S. Attorney
  08/10/1976: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  10/20/1976: Complaint Filed With Court
  04/13/1977: Concluded
  04/13/1977: Final Order Lodged
  04/13/1977: Enforcement Action Closed
  04/13/1977: Final Order Entered

Pollutants:
  NONE

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Consent Decree or Court Order Resolving a Civil Judicial Action
  Name: CORNWALL PAPER MILLS
  Settlement Entered: 04/13/1977
  Federal Penalty: $10,000
